overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a shallow river through a lush post-apocalyptic landscape during golden hour. The character enters the water, swims briefly across a deeper section, then continues walking through the stream surrounded by increasingly dense vegetation and distant ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river pool with rocky banks

events.description: character walks from rocky shore into shallow water
character begins swimming as water depth increases
character emerges from water back onto rocky stream bed

agents.ego_description: character enters the river, swims across the deeper section, and emerges on the opposite bank

entered.detail: large boulder sitting in the middle of the water pool
tall cylindrical ruined structure visible on the horizon
large tree leaning over the water from the left bank
rocky ground at the water's edge with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing at the edge of a sunlit river pool. She enters the water, swims past a large central rock as the water deepens, then emerges on the far side. The ancient tower ruin stands silhouetted against the bright sky in the distance while the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with scattered boulders

events.description: passing a small tree with red berries on the left bank

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through the shallow stream, navigating around rocks and boulders

entered.detail: large rock formation rising on the left side of the stream
small leafless tree with red berries on the left bank
scattered large rocks in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a shallow rocky stream with a large cliff face rising on the left. She passes a distinctive small tree with red berries growing on the bank. The ancient tower remains visible in the distance to the right as the stream winds through open terrain with moderate vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle stream with large tropical foliage

events.description: entering dense tropical vegetation area with large ferns and palm trees
light becomes more dappled and diffused as forest canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: character continues through the stream surrounded by dense jungle vegetation, moving deeper into the forest

entered.detail: large broad-leafed tropical plants lining the stream banks
thick tree cover overhead filtering the sunlight
tall palm trees visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The stream enters a dense jungle environment with large tropical ferns and thick vegetation crowding both banks. The lighting shifts to a softer, diffused quality as the forest canopy blocks the direct sun. The character wades through the shallow water toward a stand of palm trees visible through the misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open river pool into the shadowed depths of a dense tropical jungle. It begins with the character entering a sunlit pool and swimming past a large central rock, with an ancient tower ruin silhouetted against the bright sky in the distance. As she emerges from the water, the scene shifts to a shallow rocky stream winding past a towering cliff face and a small tree with red berries. The terrain then gradually closes in as the stream enters a lush jungle environment where large ferns and thick vegetation crowd the banks. Finally, the lighting softens into a diffused glow as the forest canopy blocks the sun, leading the character through a misty atmosphere toward a stand of palm trees.
